name: Medium Candles Print Gift Bag - Spritz™: Multicolor Typography for All Occasions, 10" x 12.75" x 5"
description: You might not be gifting them a cake, but you can give them the candles on top when you present their gift in the Candles Print Gift Bag from Spritz™. This birthday gift bag reads "Happy Birthday" in pastel hues of green, blue, red, yellow and pink that stand out against the white bag. For a celebratory touch, the letters each have a flame on top to look like birthday candles. The happy birthday gift bag makes decorating your gift easy as can be, as all it takes to create an eye-catching gift is a little bit of tissue paper peeking out of the top.
